setup.title: Murmur Setup
setup.subtitle: Create an admin account to get started
setup.successSubtitle: You can register a Passkey for quick sign-in, or go directly to the login page.
setup.passkeyOptional: Passkey is optional. You can also sign in with Magic Link.

login.title: Sign in to Murmur
login.subtitle: Enter your email to sign in via Magic Link
login.sentMessage: A sign-in link has been sent to your email.
login.passkeyFailed: Passkey sign-in failed, please try again
login.twoFactorSubtitle: Enter the verification code from your authenticator app
login.securityKeyFailed: Security key verification failed, please try again
login.githubFailed: GitHub sign-in failed, please try again

security.title: Security Settings
security.scanQrCode: Add the URI below to your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator), then enter the code to complete setup.
security.backupCodesDesc: Save these recovery codes securely. If you lose your authenticator, you can use them to sign in. Each code can only be used once.
security.securityKeyAs2FA: Registered passkeys and security keys (e.g. YubiKey) can also be used as a second factor during sign-in.
security.deletePasskeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey?
security.unlinkConfirm: Are you sure? You need at least one login method.
security.cannotUnlink: Cannot unlink: you need at least one other login method.

guard.needAuthorOrAdmin: Author or admin permissions are required to access this page.
guard.pendingApprovalDesc: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
